text: Standing here, I am struck by the paradox of being both observer and subject within a space dedicated to observation and innovation. The interplay of vivid colors and glowing screens pulls my attention inward, where self-reflection circles questions of intention, perception, and understanding. Surrounded by glass and light, I feel exposed—curious yet slightly unsettled by my own presence amidst these symbols of technological progress. There is a longing for deeper connection, not just with others, but with the intentions behind all this creation.
